meta.title: Happy Horse 1.5 AI Video Generator | Dommi
meta.description: Use Happy Horse 1.5 in Dommi to explore Alibaba video generation with sharper motion fidelity, cleaner character movement, and stronger prompt control than the first release. Use Happy Horse 1.5 when you want the upgraded Alibaba motion model; compare 1.0 for baseline behavior and Seedance 2.0 for more established cinematic control.

examples_section.intro: Use these examples to compare character motion, handheld tracking, and product action across the newer Happy Horse generation.
examples_section.attribution: Showcase clips from happyhorse.video's official Happy Horse gallery.

items.title: Performance / character motion — stage close-up
items.prompt: A K-pop performer with long silver hair in a glossy pink-and-silver mini-dress, mid-dance on a neon-lit stage. Camera tracks slightly upward as she lands a pose, stage lights flare in the background, slow-motion at the beat drop, vertical 9:16 frame.
items.result_alt: Happy Horse 1.5 K-pop stage performance clip

items.title: Cinematic narrative — handheld tracking shot
items.prompt: A man in a mustard-yellow t-shirt sprints away from camera down a long, brightly-lit modern hotel corridor. Handheld camera follows just behind in a single take, motion blur on the walls, warm overhead lighting, urgent breathing audio. 16:9, 6 seconds.
items.result_alt: Happy Horse 1.5 hotel corridor chase clip

items.title: Stylized animation — anime fantasy chase
items.prompt: Anime fantasy scene. A black-cloaked warrior with a long blade leaps mid-stride through an autumn forest in pursuit of a small fox-like creature darting through fallen orange leaves. Dynamic side-tracking camera, motion-blurred foreground, golden backlight through red maple canopy, cinematic 16:9.
items.result_alt: Happy Horse 1.5 anime warrior in autumn forest clip

how_to_section.h2: How to use Happy Horse 1.5 in Dommi
how_to_section.intro: A simple workflow for turning search intent into a usable video result with Happy Horse 1.5.

steps.title: Choose Happy Horse 1.5
steps.description: Start from Dommi's generator surface and select Happy Horse 1.5 when your goal matches its strengths: sharper motion fidelity, better character movement, audio-aware video direction.

steps.title: Write a focused prompt
steps.description: Give the model a single clear action, a camera move, a scene mood, and timing cues such as slow push-in, beat drop, or handheld follow.

steps.title: Generate, compare, refine
steps.description: Run the prompt, compare it with related Dommi models, then adjust one variable at a time so you can see what Happy Horse 1.5 changes.

faq_section.intro: Direct answers for people searching how Happy Horse 1.5 works, what it is good at, and when to use it in Dommi.

items.a: Happy Horse 1.5 is an AI video model from Alibaba. In Dommi, this page explains where it fits, shows prompt examples, and connects it with related video models so creators can choose the right workflow.

items.q: What is Happy Horse 1.5 best for?
items.a: Happy Horse 1.5 is best for iterating on people, performance, action, and audio-aware video ideas where motion realism matters. Its main strengths are sharper motion fidelity, better character movement, audio-aware video direction.

items.q: How do I prompt Happy Horse 1.5?
items.a: Give the model a single clear action, a camera move, a scene mood, and timing cues such as slow push-in, beat drop, or handheld follow.

items.q: How is Happy Horse 1.5 different from related models?
items.a: Use Happy Horse 1.5 when you want the upgraded Alibaba motion model; compare 1.0 for baseline behavior and Seedance 2.0 for more established cinematic control.

items.q: Can I use a reference image with Happy Horse 1.5?
items.a: Yes. Use image-to-video when you already have a frame, product shot, character, or scene and want Happy Horse 1.5 to animate it with controlled camera and subject motion.

items.q: Can I compare Happy Horse 1.5 with other Dommi models?
items.a: Yes. Use the related model links on this page to compare Happy Horse 1.5 with nearby options, then reuse the same prompt so the difference between models is easier to judge.

final_cta.body: Open Dommi and test Happy Horse 1.5 on your most motion-heavy idea.
